message:
chore(deps): bump insta to 1.47.2, proptest to 1.11.0, and update lockfile

- insta: 1.46.3 → 1.47.2 (snapshot testing)
- proptest: 1.10.0 → 1.11.0 (property-based testing)
- arc-swap: 1.9.0 → 1.9.1
- cc: 1.2.57 → 1.2.59
- console: 0.15.11 → 0.16.3
- fastrand: 2.3.0 → 2.4.0
- Various windows-sys unification and transitive updates in lockfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
